MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT KAZMER UJVAROSY'S CROSS-PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD WITH AWARD OF FEES AND COSTS.
Appearances: Frank S. Moore (292.6091) for moving party Kazmer Ujvarosy; William J. Kelly (no card provided) for responding party James Coy Driscoll.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: respondent's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. Respondent is awarded $14,000 in fees and $490 in costs. The court granted petitioner's request for a stay until July 18, 2011. Respondent to submit proposed forms of order and judgment. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Mtn To Grant Petitioner'S To Correct Or Vacate The Binding Arb Award
Off Calendar Jul-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JAMES DRISCOLL'S MOTION TO GRANT PETITIONER'S PETITION TO CORRECT OR VACATE THE BINDING ARBITRATION AWARD.
Appearances: Frank S. Moore (292.6091) for responding party Kazmer Ujvarosy; William J. Kelly (no card provided) for moving party James Coy Driscoll.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: petitioner's motion to vacate the arbitration award is denied. The court granted petitioner's request for a stay until July 18, 2011. Respondent to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Appearances: Frank S. Moore (292.6091) for moving party Kazmer Ujvarosy; William J. Kelly (no card provided) for responding party James Coy Driscoll.
Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: cross-complainant's request for leave to file Anti-SLAPP motion is denied. The court reduced the fee award by 6 hours.
